_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: 6 μM UC1 inhibited the erg6Δ control strain by 28% after 8 hours, while the erg6Δ nab3-3 strain was inhibited by 73%
details: erg6Δ nab3-3 strain showed increased UC1 sensitivity with 73% inhibition at 6 μM compared to 28% in control
